bank_impersonation.label: Bank impersonation call
bank_impersonation.transcript: Hello, this is the fraud department for your credit card account. We detected a suspicious charge and need you to confirm your identity, stay on the line, and read back the one-time code we just sent.

family_emergency.label: Family emergency scam
family_emergency.transcript: Grandma, it is your grandson. I was in an accident and I need bail money right away. Please do not tell anyone else yet and send the payment today.

government_pressure.label: Government pressure call
government_pressure.transcript: This is Officer Ramirez from the court division. If you do not make this payment today, police will be sent to your address. Do not hang up while we process the transfer.

safe_support.label: Safe customer support style call
safe_support.transcript: Thanks for calling customer support. I can help you reset the app, and if you are unsure, please hang up and use the number on your card statement.
